div#basic-box.box { width: 100 behavior on width { NumberAnimation { duration: 8000 easing: "linear" } } text { basic } } div#rebase-box.box { width: "100px" behavior on width { NumberAnimation { duration: 14000 easing: "easeInOutQuad" } } text { rebase } } div#disabled-box.box { width: "10vh" behavior on width { NumberAnimation { duration: 10000 running: false } } text { disabled } } div#percent-box.box { width: "50%" behavior on width { NumberAnimation { duration: 6000 } } text { percent } } div#vh-box.box { width: "50vh" behavior on width { NumberAnimation { duration: 6000 } } text { vh } }
